query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Minnesota Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-24 the live MDE-ORG description page, glossary root, district route, county route, contact routes, and analytics route.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-24 bounded official Minnesota MDE education surfaces. The description page at https://education.mn.gov/MDE/about/SchOrg/ returned HTTP 200 with title `Schools and Organizations (MDE-ORG)`. The glossary root at https://pub.education.mn.gov/MdeOrgView/ returned HTTP 200 with title `MDE Organization Reference Glossary`, and the district route at https://pub.education.mn.gov/MdeOrgView/districts/index returned HTTP 200 with title `Schools and Districts`. But the county route at https://pub.education.mn.gov/MdeOrgView/reference/county, the contact-search route at https://pub.education.mn.gov/MdeOrgView/search/searchContacts, the contact-type route at https://pub.education.mn.gov/MdeOrgView/contact/contactTypeList, and the analytics route at https://pub.education.mn.gov/MDEAnalytics/Data.jsp all redirected into `validate.perfdrive.com` with title `Radware Captcha Page`. Minnesota therefore still lacks a reviewable county-grade district routing contract in low-token mode, but the current truth is live root plus live district navigation chrome with county/contact/analytics still bot-gated.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official description page is live with title `Schools and Organizations (MDE-ORG)` and still describes MDE-ORG as a searchable database.
The glossary root is live with title `MDE Organization Reference Glossary` and visible first-party navigation including `Schools and Districts`.
The route is publicly reachable with title `Schools and Districts`, but this still does not establish a county-grade contract because the county and contact lanes remain blocked.
The county route and contact child routes redirect into `validate.perfdrive.com` with title `Radware Captcha Page` instead of yielding county-grade organization data.
The analytics route still redirects into `validate.perfdrive.com` with title `Radware Captcha Page`, so there is no stable public export contract.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed 2026-06-22 the dedicated first-party Minnesota Disability Law Center page and the Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid homepage.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Minnesota Disability Law Center page states that MDLC of Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid is the federally designated Protection and Advocacy agency for people with disabilities in the state of Minnesota.
The homepage preserves a live statewide Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid intake route plus direct Minnesota Disability Law Center contact routing.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-23 the authoritative Parent Center Hub Minnesota state leaf after PACER first-party pages no longer preserved explicit PTI designation text.

samples.sample_name: Parent Center Hub Minnesota PTI listing
samples.evidence_snippet: Minnesota PTI. PACER Center, Inc. 8161 Normandale Boulevard Bloomington, MN 55437-1044 (952) 838-9000 | (888) 248-0822 (National) http://www.pacer.org

query_basis: Reviewed first-party statewide legal-aid access source.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid homepage preserves a first-party statewide legal-aid access route, online intake, phone intake, and Minnesota Disability Law Center contact routing.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-24 the saved DHS county-and-tribal replacement URLs directly on official Minnesota DHS hosts.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-24 bounded official Minnesota DHS county-and-tribal replacements. https://mn.gov/dhs/people-we-serve/adults/services/disability-services/county-and-tribal-offices/ returned HTTP 404 with title `404 / Minnesota Department of Human Services`, and https://mn.gov/dhs/people-we-serve/adults/services/disability-services/partners-and-providers/county-tribal-nation-directory/ returned the same official DHS 404 page. Minnesota therefore still lacks a reviewable county-grade county/tribal office contract on the saved first-party replacements, and the blocker is now official 404 replacements rather than a live captcha family.

samples.evidence_snippet: The saved replacement now returns HTTP 404 with title `404 / Minnesota Department of Human Services` rather than a public local-office directory.
The adjacent saved replacement also returns the official DHS 404 page and still does not expose county or tribal office routing.
The old `.jsp` county-and-tribal-offices path remains stale and no longer preserves a reviewed local-office contract.
